reviews.comment:
Nos detuvimos a conocer el pueblo y tomamos una merienda. Muy agradable el lugar, la gente amable y sencilla.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to explore the town and had a snack. The place was very pleasant, and the people were friendly and down-to-earth.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su visita, lo esperamos nuevamente.

reviews.comment:
Buena, amables, no hay lugar para dormir en el auto/motorhome y algo raro, no tienen tacho de basura, pregunté a el playero y me dijo que no tienen, raaaaaaaro 🤭

(Translated by Google)
Good, friendly, there's no place to sleep in the car/motorhome and something strange, they don't have a trash can, I asked the attendant and he said they don't have one, weird 🤭

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su visita, tenemos tachos de basura, debe ser un mal entendido del playero.

reviews.comment:
En una ubicación inmejorable, es una parada indispensable para relajarse y disfrutar de una buena atención, un clima ameno e instalaciones impecables atendidas por gente muy cordial como Patricia quienes te hacen sentir como en casa.

(Translated by Google)
In an unbeatable location, it is an essential stop to relax and enjoy good service, a pleasant atmosphere and impeccable facilities attended by very friendly people like Patricia who make you feel at home.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13471578260485529773/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdzh6S21RRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable, Patricia is a genius! Highly recommended for a stop to enjoy the tranquility of a beautiful place.
